_publications._publicationTitle: Comparison of 1D and 3D volume measurement techniques in NF2-associated vestibular schwannoma monitoring.

_contextSnippet: In total, 2586 measurements (3D volumetrics: 2586; MLD measurements: 10344, including all dimensions) were performed
details: Used for segmented volumetric analysis (SVA) which served as the gold standard for tumor volume measurement with 2586 measurements performed
